title: Minions by MOB
body:
Minecraft Minions Plugin - Auto Mining Minions
Description:
This plugin adds fully automated mining minions to your Minecraft server, inspired by Hypixel’s minion system! These minions will mine stone blocks in their designated area, generating resources over time without requiring player intervention.

Features:

Automated Mining – Minions mine stone and regenerate the blocks automatically.
Storage System – Minions have built-in storage that fills up over tie.

How It Works:

Place a minion down, and it will start mining stone within its radius.
The mined stone regenerates automatically, ensuring infinite mining.
Collect resources manually or link the minion to a chest for auto-storage.

Perfect For:

Skyblock, Survival, and Economy Servers
Passive Income Mechanics
Customizable Automated Farming

command - /minion
